task: The user reveals their birth year, asks an unrelated math question in the middle, then asks the agent to compute their age assuming the current year is 2024. The agent must remember the birth year across turns.

conversation_history.content: Got it, I will remember that you were born in 1990.
If the current year were 2024, how old would I be?

notes: Tests memory of a numeric fact (birth year) across an unrelated intermediate turn, then use of that fact in a downstream subtraction.
